Curated calculator collection

Investment Calculators

DCA, portfolio, market cap analysis. Start with DCA Calculator, Portfolio Allocation Calculator, Rebalancing Calculator and compare outcomes across multiple scenarios.

20 calculators Last updated: 2026-02-21

Long-term crypto investment requires more than conviction about price direction. It demands a systematic approach to entry timing, position sizing, portfolio allocation, and periodic rebalancing. Emotional decisions driven by fear of missing out or panic during drawdowns consistently destroy value over multi-year horizons. The investment calculators in this category translate proven portfolio management disciplines into concrete numbers, converting strategy from aspiration into operations. Whether you are deploying a lump sum, building a position gradually through dollar-cost averaging, or allocating across a diversified basket of assets, these tools ensure every decision is backed by quantified assumptions rather than gut feeling.

The DCA Calculator simulates historical dollar-cost averaging by modeling fixed-amount purchases on a daily, weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly schedule across any time period. It reveals your average entry price, compares DCA performance against lump-sum investing, and shows how the strategy would have navigated past bull and bear cycles. The results often surprise both advocates and critics of DCA because outcomes are highly sensitive to the specific period examined. The Portfolio Allocation Calculator answers the complementary question: how should capital be distributed across multiple assets given your risk tolerance? Enter target allocations and current holdings to see how far you have drifted from plan and what rebalancing trades are required.

Market cap analysis grounds your expectations in mathematical reality. The Market Cap Calculator and Market Cap Comparator address the common mental exercise of asking what a token price would be if it achieved the market cap of another project. This comparative framework helps calibrate whether a bullish narrative requires plausible assumptions about market size or demands an impossible share of global capital flows. Use these alongside the What If Calculator, which applies the historical price trajectory of one asset to your current holdings in another, to stress-test optimistic targets against real data.

At the edges of the investment spectrum, specialized calculators address niche but growing asset classes. The GameFi ROI Calculator models token economics beyond simple price appreciation by incorporating play-to-earn rates, emission schedules, and in-game asset depreciation. The Inflation Hedge Calculator sits at the opposite end, modeling how adding a crypto allocation affects the purchasing-power preservation of a traditional portfolio relative to fiat inflation over multi-year horizons. Together, the investment tools in this category create a complete workflow: define your allocation strategy, simulate entry timing, benchmark against alternatives, and rebalance on schedule.

Category FAQ

Quick answers before you run your first scenario.

What can I calculate in the Investment category?

This category groups practical calculators around investment. It helps you compare several tools quickly instead of jumping page by page.

Which calculator should I start with?

Start with DCA Calculator. Then run at least one adjacent tool in the same category to stress-test your assumptions.

Are these tools free and private?

Yes. CryptoCalk calculators are free to use, run directly in your browser, and do not require account signup.
